title: PlayerCosmetics
description: A minecraft datapack that adds cosmetic to your game!
body:
🧢 Cosmetics Datapack

The Cosmetics Datapack adds stylish, animated cosmetics to your Minecraft player — all without any mods! Show off your look with hats, masks, glasses, particles, and more, using simple commands. Perfect for roleplay, servers, or just flexing your style! ✨ Features:

🔹 Custom Cosmetics like: top hat, fox, glasses, wings, and more 🌟 Each cosmetic includes unique particles and visual effects 
🎭 Combine with Emotes for extra flair 🧍 Fully works in multiplayer — each player can have their own style 💬 Activation messages like "You equipped the Fox cosmetic!" 
🧽 Use /function cosmetics:clear to remove all cosmetics at any time ⚙️ Easy to add more cosmetics with your own particle ideas!

📜 Usage: Run /function cosmetics:<cosmetic_name> Example: /function cosmetics:fox

/function cosmetics:clear

🧢 Cosmetics: 🦊 Fox: Makes you turn into fox! 🕶 Glasses: Sunglasses appears at your eyes! 🎩 Top Hat: Circle particles forming a hat shape and many more cosmetics!

❗Warning: Please have particles on. If you didn't turn them on, or you have them off then the cosmetics won't show!

❕Non-Important Warning: If you go in spectator mode, the cosmetics will show still. Making you visible to other people.
